title: Garden Mile Expanding Ivy Trellis Wall Climbing Panel Fence Privacy Screen for Garden, Artificial Living Wall Panel Flower Expandable Fence 180 x 90cm
features: Specification - Green Leaf Trellis, 180 cm x 90 cm. Made from real willow frame with decorative faux leaves attached, provides a natural look, no maintenance, no watering, no trimming, easy to clean with water.

Durable - The leaves of our fence are exquisite and simulated with clear veins, , high dense and lightweight, block most UV rays, keep some privacy and allow the air go through freely. No matter for indoor or outdoor use are all great.

Versatile - Expandable to create an instant privacy fence screen covered with faux ivy leaves. Flexible, expands or contracts to your desired dimensions and privacy, ideal for wedding decoration, outdoor landscaping design, greenery wall covering, garden fence, balcony privacy screen and home décor.
Easy Use - The stakes are driven into the soil, and the fences can be fastened with cable ties, wire, nails, or hooks. Just lay out a faux greenery wall to make your garden look special.

Trellis Screen - The Trellis is maintenance- free, ideal for those who don't wish to or can't find time to maintain a garden. This means you can enjoy the beautifully fresh look with no up-keep required.
